utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it includes all five sections. Verify each is fully specified according to the required details: 
- health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs and total monthly/annual cost; benefits listed; thus fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Includes home/contents insurance with costs; monthly and annual totals provided; benefits listed; fully specified with costs.
- travel_coverage: Includes travel insurance with costs; monthly and annual totals provided; benefits listed; fully specified with costs.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services with costs (some included, one with €25/month); adequately specified with costs.
- total_budget: Provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown and additional budget notes; fully specified.
All 5 required items are present and include the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific providers/plans. We need to find exact matches in the ground-truth ratings and return their ratings. Matches found: PrimeCare Premium Plan for health physical (rating 6) and mental health (rating 4 under mental health). Property coverage uses LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9 under home_content). Travel coverage uses LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9 under travel_insurance) and also includes Adventure Travel Coverage add-on (rating 10 under travel_enhancement_services). The plan also mentions LifeFirst Standard Plan for base travel and LifeFirst for adventure travel; the adventure component corresponds to Adventure Travel Coverage at rating 10.
